acceptance_criteria.text: A user can create a custom agent for checking new company reviews, drafting a reply, and sending the review plus draft to Telegram without automatic publication.
proof: Created a custom Riderra agent in the production browser flow.
Ran a safe test that produced a pending human decision without accepting it or sending externally.
Final browser check: hasCreatedAgent=true, hasPendingDecision=true, consoleErrors=0.

acceptance_criteria.text: Required connection/provider choices are visible in the main builder flow.
proof: Inline route/connection choice panel added and used to complete creation.

acceptance_criteria.text: Created-agent overview uses product language and hides internal technical terms.
proof: Final browser check found no visible OpenClaw, Boundary, provider route, preflight, Preview run, Production run, Последний run, or маршрут.
Visible labels show отзывы компании, Telegram, профиль бизнеса; Последний запуск; Выбрать способ подключения.

known_gaps: The pending human decision was not accepted to avoid external side effects.
